name: Peanut Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the crust from bread and divide into lengthwise strips (or trim to pork chop shape).
2. Spread peanut butter on both sides of each strip.
3. Add milk and seasonings to the eggs and beat thoroughly.
4. Dip strips of bread into egg mixture, then into sifted cracker crumbs.
5. Place the coated strips into a greased bread pan.
6. Bake in a hot oven at 450°F until golden brown.
